evals.prompt: I want to show real-time progress of a long-running Trigger.dev task in my Next.js React app. The task processes a batch of items and I want a progress bar. How do I set this up?
evals.expected_output: Should cover: auth.createPublicToken, useRealtimeRun or useRealtimeTaskTrigger hook, metadata for progress, @trigger.dev/react-hooks
expectations: Includes auth token creation (createPublicToken or createTriggerPublicToken)', 'type': 'content_check
